creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from John Mehr <jcm@visi.com> -----

Date: Sat, 20 Apr 2013 16:49:57 -0500
From: John Mehr <jcm@visi.com>
To: jgh@FreeBSD.org, freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/177972: net/svnup: Invalid port/protocol: No such
	file or directory
X-Mailer: CommuniGate Pro WebUser v5.3.11

Hello,

The output of usage() is not descriptive enough and I've updated it to
reflect the new svnup.conf options.

I'm replacing my self-balancing tree with the standard red-black tree
structure found in sys/tree.h and should have a new version ready to
go by Monday.  Thanks!

----- End forwarded message -----
